login.description: Log in to an existing character

logout.description: Log out and return to login screen

look.description: Look at your surroundings or a direction

exits.description: List all exits and their destinations

go.description: Move in a direction (north, east, south, west, up, down)

say.description: Say something to others in the room

weather.description: Check the current time, weather, and temperature

emote.description: Perform an action visible to others in the room

tell.description: Send a private message to another player

time.description: Check the time by looking at the sky

whisper.description: Whisper to a player in the same room

shout.description: Shout a message that carries to adjacent rooms

dig.description: Unearth buried items, or (builders) dig a new room in a direction

bury.description: Bury an item in a dirt-floor room

link.description: Link an exit to an existing room

unlink.description: Remove an exit from the current room

rlist.description: List all rooms in the database

rgoto.description: Teleport to a room by ID

rdelete.description: Delete a room from the database

roomflags.description: Toggle room flags and vnum display (see also: set roomflags)

setbuilder.description: Manage builder access (behavior depends on server settings)

setadmin.description: Grant or revoke admin access (admin only)

mxp.description: Toggle MXP (clickable links) support (see also: set mxp)

get.description: Pick up an item or gold from the room or container

drop.description: Drop an item or gold from your inventory/balance

give.description: Give an item or gold to another player

gold.description: Check your gold on hand and bank savings

wear.description: Equip an item from your inventory

ilist.description: List all items in the database

idelete.description: Delete an item from the database

color.description: Toggle ANSI color display (see also: set color)

lock.description: Lock a container with a key

unlock.description: Unlock a container with a key

put.description: Put an item or gold into a container

mlist.description: List all mobiles in the database

mdelete.description: Delete a mobile from the database

mspawn.description: Spawn a mobile from a prototype by vnum

ospawn.description: Spawn an item from a prototype by vnum

gspawn.description: Spawn gold in a room or container

spedit.description: Create and manage spawn points in an area

bpredit.description: Create and manage shop buy presets

areset.description: Manually reset all spawn points in an area

buildmode.description: Toggle build mode (bypass restrictions in your areas)

list.description: Show items for sale at a shopkeeper

buy.description: Buy an item from a shopkeeper

sell.description: Sell an item to a shopkeeper

appraise.description: Ask a shopkeeper what they'll pay for an item

compare.description: Compare an item to your currently equipped item in the same slot

identify.description: Ask a shopkeeper to fully identify an item (costs gold)

junk.description: Permanently destroy an item from your inventory

status.description: Show your character stats including gold balance

traits.description: Spend remaining trait points or view your traits

pray.description: Send a message to online administrators

sit.description: Sit down to rest (restores stamina faster)

rest.description: Sit down to rest (alias for sit)

sleep.description: Go to sleep (fastest stamina and HP regeneration)

stand.description: Stand up from sitting or sleeping

skills.description: View your skill levels and progress

cast.description: Cast a spell on a target

recipes.description: List known recipes for a skill

cook.description: Prepare food using the cooking skill

craft.description: Create items using the crafting skill

read.description: Read an item (may learn recipes from books)

fish.description: Fish in water using a fishing rod

forage.description: Search for items in the area

wield.description: Wield a weapon in your main hand

rcopy.description: Copy room properties from another room

reclist.description: List all recipes in the database

recdelete.description: Delete a recipe from the database

diagnose.description: View medical status including wounds, conditions, and exposure

revive.description: Revive an unconscious player (requires medical skill 6+)

distress.description: Send a distress call on the medical helpline

reel.description: Reel in your fishing line when a fish bites

attack.description: Attack a target to start combat

flee.description: Flee from combat to a random exit

gtell.description: Send a message to your group members

split.description: Split gold evenly among group members

press.description: Press buttons to call elevators or select floors

tlist.description: List all transports in the database

assist.description: Join combat by attacking your ally's target

consider.description: Gauge the difficulty of a mobile opponent

ask.description: Ask a simulated NPC how they feel about someone: ask <mobile> about <other>

enter.description: Enter your rented property from the leasing office

escrow.description: View and retrieve items from escrow storage

pdelete.description: Delete a property template and its rooms

pedit.description: Property template editor - create/edit rental property templates

pfind.description: Search property templates by vnum or name

properties.description: List available properties at a leasing agent

property.description: View and manage your property settings

rent.description: Rent a property from a leasing agent

tour.description: Preview a property template before renting

upgrade.description: Transfer to a new property in the same area

shoot.description: Fire a ranged weapon at a target

snipe.description: Snipe a target in an adjacent room

reload.description: Load ammunition into your ranged weapon

unload.description: Eject loaded ammunition from your weapon

attach.description: Attach an item to a ranged weapon

detach.description: Detach an item from a ranged weapon

schedule.description: View an NPC's daily routine schedule

plant.description: Plant a seed in the ground or a pot

garden.description: View status of plants in the room

sneak.description: Toggle sneaking mode to move silently (stealth 1+)

hide.description: Hide in the shadows of the current room (stealth 1+)

search.description: Search the room for hidden characters and traps (tracking 1+)

steal.description: Steal gold or items from a target (thievery 1+)

pick.description: Pick a lock on a door or container (thievery 2+)

track.description: Search for tracks of a target in the current room (tracking 2+)

covertracks.description: Obscure your tracks in the current room (tracking 2+)

lore.description: Study a creature's capabilities and weaknesses (tracking 2+)

camouflage.description: Blend into wilderness terrain for enhanced concealment (tracking 3+)

backstab.description: Attack from hiding with a devastating strike (stealth 3+)

bash.description: Charge a target, dealing modest damage and stunning them on hit

circle.description: Flank your opponent mid-combat for a bonus attack (stealth 4+)

envenom.description: Apply poison from a vial to your wielded weapon (thievery 4+)

poison.description: Lace a piece of food or a drink with poison (anyone can try; thievery 3+ to do it cleanly)

imbue.description: Coat a stack of ammunition with poison from a vial (thievery 4+)

settrap.description: Place a trap in the room using a trap kit (thievery 3+)

disarm.description: Attempt to disarm a visible trap (thievery 3+)

hunt.description: Automatically track and follow a target (tracking 4+)

butcher.description: Butcher a corpse for meat, pelts, and bones (tracking 2+)

disguise.description: Assume a false identity using a disguise kit (stealth 5+)

undisguise.description: Remove your disguise and reveal your true identity

bind.description: Bind your spawn point to the current room

recall.description: Teleport back to your spawn point

retreat.description: Retreat from combat to create distance

advance.description: Advance toward combat target to close distance

motd.description: Manage the Message of the Day

summon.description: Summon a mobile or player to your location or a room
